title: cucurbita pepo var. fraterna
intro: Cucurbita pepo var. fraterna, also known as the 'Zabi' or 'Fraterna' pumpkin, is a type of vining pumpkin plant that belongs to the Cucurbitaceae family. Traditionally used in folk medicine, the plant's seeds, roots, and leaves are reported to have anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The medicinal properties of Cucurbita pepo var. fraterna are said to provide several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as decoctions and infusions, are typically made from the seeds, roots, or leaves and are used in traditional medicine to alleviate symptoms of various ailments.
